description: Testing the UI elements and layout of the audio recorder interface

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check UI
+ Title of audio (font size, position)
+ Recording date and time
+ Recording area
- Timer(counter)
- Voice waveform panel
- Timeline panel
-Status: recording/ pause / now playing
- Button:  [Start Recording],[Done/Complete] , [pause], [Resume]
+Edit Menu 
(items in menu include: Add URL, Image, Article  )
expected_result: UI must be same the design

description: Testing audio title display and input functionality with various character types and lengths

+Check Title of Audio display when title contain JP (half size, full size) character, alphanumeric character

+Number of Title characters  <X charactes 
+Number of Title character =X characters
+Check defaut tittle
expected_result:
+Display  title of audio correctly
+Display titlte of audio correctly with X characters + [...]
+Display correctly in 1 line, Title of audio is display center 
+Display correctly coresponding to each device
+Display defaut tittle correctly [base on required]

expected_result: Do nothing or editable base on spec

Can't record

expected_result: [Start Recording] button is change to [Pause] button

expected_result: unable to swipe and move on waveform

expected_result: 3 second countdown starts by default before recording starts.

Timmer starts counting immediately and
count up from 00:00.00

X is max recording time

description: Testing preview playback functionality including controls, display, and audio speed

test_view_points.viewpoint: After pause recording,Tap on [preview play] button
expected_result:
Preview play instantly
Can hear the sound playing.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check button [Preview play] when tap on button [Preview play]
expected_result: Button [Preview play] changes to button [pause preview play]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check timer when tap on  [preview play] icon
expected_result: Timer reset to 00:00.00 and count up

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check Voice waveform when tap on  [preview play] icon
expected_result: Voice waveform is displayed the same as recording operation

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check preview play from specified position as swiped waveform  (drap and drop to specified positon on waveform)
expected_result: Can play from specified position as swiped waveform  (drap and drop to specified positon on waveform)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check scrolling of time ruler
expected_result: Time ruler  scroll to beginning of ruler, then Time ruler scroll from right to left

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check time display in the time ruler
Check status when tap on  [preview play] icon
Check default speed
Check adjust speed
expected_result:
Adjustable speeds from 1x to 1.2x
Adjustable speeds from 1x to 1.5x
Adjustable speeds1.5x to 2x
Adjustable speeds  2x to 1x

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check keep the set speed when click Play - Pause -Play
Check when tap on  [pause preview play] icon
expected_result:
Pause preview play instantly
Can't hear the sound playing.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check button [Pause Preview play] when tap on button [ Pause Preview play]
expected_result: Button [ Pause Preview play] changes to button [preview play]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check button [Pause Preview play] when preview play finish
expected_result: Button [ Pause Preview play] changes to button [preview play]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check continuous tap on [pause preview play]-[play preview]-[Pause preview play] Buttons
expected_result:
Pause preview play
App works normally
